ddls:
CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the AWS Trusted Advisor action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required for the action (e.g., Read, Write) */,
  "required_resource_types" TEXT /* Resource types required for the action */,
  "condition_keys" TEXT /* Condition keys for granting the permission */,
  "dependent_actions" TEXT /* Dependent actions for the permission */,
  "resource_arns" TEXT /* ARNs of the resources the permission applies to */,
  "condition_logic" TEXT /* Logical conditions for granting the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_access_level FOREIGN KEY ("access_level") REFERENCES access_levels ("access_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_levels" (
  "access_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access level */,
  "access_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the access level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the access level */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field containing a list of permission IDs associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the association */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
